state_law: P30 RK4 predator-prey transition mean with additive Gaussian process noise on (P,Q)

reference_routes.dense_reference: small tensor-product dense quadrature on the declared RK4 additive-Gaussian closure target
reference_routes.cut4: CUT4 diagnostic on the same additive-Gaussian structural closure
reference_routes.zhao_cui: P46/P47 multistate retained-grid fixed-design TT route

production_prerequisites: reviewed production or near-paper-scale run manifest
downstream filtering value and state-quality metrics
matched budget and wall-time accounting if a preconditioning comparison is promoted
nonclaims: not native or non-Gaussian predator-prey correctness beyond the declared additive-Gaussian closure
CUT4 state moments are diagnostic only in M5a
veto_diagnostics: negative or nonfinite state values silently promoted
raw ESS or proposal metric promoted without downstream filtering quality
native and additive-Gaussian closure targets mixed
production token emitted from lower-rung evidence
finite output promoted as production correctness
